case_title: PEGGY HUGHES VS. CAROLYN J CLINE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CLINE, CAROLYN J

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-05-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY MAIYGYNE LA LANO--ASSISTANT TO DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CLINE, CAROLYN J
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,447.50 FILED BY HUGHES, PEGGY AS TO DEFENDANT CLINE, CAROLYN J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $120.00) SERVED AUG-05-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CLINE, CAROLYN J
CORRESPONDENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT CLINE, CAROLYN J
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT CLINE, CAROLYN J
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY HUGHES, PEGGY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY MAIYGYNE LA LAND--BOOKKEEPER. CLERK WAS SHOWN RECEIPT OF FULL PAYMENT BY DEFENDANT TO THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
